description: An edge function doing heavy or stateful work exceeds CPU/memory limits and is killed, dropping requests globally.
body: Failure mode: logic ported from the origin runs per-request at the edge but exceeds the CPU-ms/memory cap or assumes a filesystem, so the runtime kills it and requests fail across all PoPs. Detection signals: elevated function-error/kill rate; CPU-limit-exceeded logs; code using fs or large deps. Do not run unbounded or stateful work at the edge. Safer fallback: keep edge functions short and stateless, move heavy/stateful work to the origin, measure the budget, and canary before global rollout.
